instruction: Configure power behavior for presentations: turn off dim screen when inactive, disable automatic screen blanking (idle-delay=0), and save ~/Desktop/power_policy_audit.txt with exactly two lines: idle-dim=false and idle-delay=0.

parameters.command: gsettings set org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.power idle-dim true; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 300; rm -f ~/Desktop/power_policy_audit.txt

result.command:
dim=$(gsettings get org.gnome.settings-daemon.plugins.power idle-dim 2>/dev/null); idle=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); ok=1; [ "$dim" = "false" ] || ok=0; [ "$idle" = "uint320" ] || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
idle-dim=false
idle-delay=0
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/power_policy_audit.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
